zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Savile於1440年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir John Saville31歲，母親Anne Gascoigne35歲。她和Oliver Mirfield至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1488年11月22日在英國越可爾巴特利享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Savile于1440年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir John Saville31岁，母亲Anne Gascoigne35岁。她和Oliver Mirfield至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1488年11月22日在英国越可爾巴特利享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Savile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Saville
meanings: English (of Norman origin; Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in northern France of which the identity is not clear, though it is probably Sainville in Eure-et-Loire, so called from Old French saisne ‘Saxon’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Savel , Savell , and Savelle .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Savile was born in 1440, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John Saville, was 31 and her mother, Anne Gascoigne, was 35. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Oliver Mirfield. She died on 22 November 1488, in Batley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Savile est née en 1440, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Saville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anne Gascoigne, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Oliver Mirfield. Elle est décédée le 22 novembre 1488, à Batley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Savile 1440 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Saville 31 und ihre Mutter Anne Gascoigne 35. Sie hatte mit Oliver Mirfield mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. November 1488 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Batley, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Savile è nata il nel 1440 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Saville, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Anne Gascoigne, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Oliver Mirfield. Morì il 22 novembre 1488, nel Batley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Savileが1440年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Savilleは31歳，母Anne Gascoigneは35歳であった。彼女はOliver Mirfieldとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1488年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアバトリーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Savile(이)가 1440년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Saville(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Gascoigne(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Oliver Mirfield(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르 바틀리에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Savile nasceu em 1440, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Saville, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Anne Gascoigne, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Oliver Mirfield. Ela faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1488, em Batley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Savile родилась в 1440 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Saville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anne Gascoigne, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Oliver Mirfield. Она умерла 22 ноября 1488 г. в местности батли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Savile nació en 1440, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Saville, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anne Gascoigne, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Oliver Mirfield. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1488, en Batley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
